ingredients: 185 g sambal stir-fry paste (e.g., AYAM Malaysian Sambal Stir Fry Paste)
500 g raw prawns, peeled and deveined
steps: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add onion and stir-fry about 2 minutes until softened.
Add sambal stir-fry paste, stir and bring to a simmer.
Add prawns and stir-fry until prawns are cooked through.
tips: Do not overcook prawns; they are done once opaque and curled. Add a splash of water if sauce thickens too quickly.
